POWELL: LITERALLY STAYING BECAUSE OF THE ACTIONS OF THE ADMINISTRATION POWELL: NO CHOICE BUT TO STAY

FED CHAIR POWELL, ASKED WHETHER REMAINING ON THE FED BOARD IS A POLITICAL DECISION, RESPONDED THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW IT THAT WAY AT ALL — INSISTING HE IS STAYING SOLELY IN RESPONSE TO THE ADMINISTRATION'S ACTIONS AND THAT HE HAS "NO CHOICE BUT TO STAY."

data.title: Pfizer Says Cancer Therapy Beats Standard Therapy In Late-Stage Blood Cancer Study
data.description: Pfizer Inc. revealed results from a late-stage study of its cancer drug, ELREXFIO (elranatamab), targeting multiple myeloma, a type of blood cancer impacting plasma cells produced in the bone marrow. This cancer is the second most prevalent across the globe, with 36,000 new cases annually in the U.S. and 187,000 worldwide. Pfizer's Phase 3 MagnetisMM-5 trial, examining ELREXFIO for multiple myeloma, reported a significant enhancement in the primary endpoint of progression-free survival. ELREXFIO is currently approved in more than 35 countries. This promising development comes as major drug companies consider Inhibrx cancer medications valued at over $8 billion, causing stock values to rise.

data.title: Claggett & Sykes Trial Lawyers Open Salt Lake City Office
data.description: Claggett & Sykes Trial Lawyers, having recently secured over $1 billion in awards from two landmark cases in Utah, are now expanding their operations. The renowned firm is opening a new office in Salt Lake City on April 29, 2026.

Powell: "After my chair ends I will continue to serve on the board of governors for a period of time, I plan to keep a lower profile on the board of governors"
